caption.note: label + ' ' + number + caption text; positions above/below

footnotes.numbering: arabic auto, note at bottom of page

endnotes.numbering: lower-roman auto, note at end of document

toc.levels: 1-3 from Heading 1-3, with page numbers + leader dots

index.marking: MarkIndexEntry adds XE fields; Insert Index builds alphabetical with page numbers
